item.title: Weaponizing Trust Signals: Claude Code Lures and GitHub Release Payloads
item.description: A packaging error in Anthropic’s Claude Code npm release briefly exposed internal source code. This entry examines how threat actors rapidly weaponized the resulting attention, pivoting an existing AI-themed campaign to spread Vidar and GhostSocks.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Santos
Sophia Nilette Robles
Jeffrey Francis Bonaobra
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: TrendAI Insight: New U.S. National Cyber Strategy
item.description: TrendAI reviews the White House National Cyber Strategy, outlining six pillars to strengthen U.S. cybersecurity—from deterrence and regulation to federal modernization, critical infrastructure protection, AI leadership, and workforce development.
item.dc:creator: Jon Clay
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: The Real Risk of Vibecoding
item.description: This blog looks at how AI‑driven vibecoding speeds up software development while increasing security risk by outpacing traditional review and ownership. It explains why security needs to move earlier and be built into modern development workflows.
item.dc:creator: Bestin Koruthu
Nicolas Boutmy
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: TrendAI™ Research at RSAC 2026: Advancing Defense Across AI‑Driven and Cyber‑Physical Threats
item.description: TrendAI™ Research explored agentic AI cybercrime and EV infrastructure security through two research sessions at RSAC 2026.
item.dc:creator: TrendAI™ Research
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: TeamPCP’s Telnyx Attack Marks a Shift in Tactics Beyond LiteLLM
item.description: Moving beyond their LiteLLM campaign, TeamPCP weaponizes the Telnyx Python SDK with stealthy WAV‑based payloads to steal credentials across Linux, macOS, and Windows.
item.dc:creator: John Rainier Navato
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Your AI Gateway Was a Backdoor: Inside the LiteLLM Supply Chain Compromise
item.description: TeamPCP orchestrated one of the most sophisticated multi-ecosystem supply chain campaigns publicly documented to date. It cascaded through developer tooling and compromised LiteLLM and exposed how AI proxy services that concentrate API keys and cloud credentials become high-value collateral when supply chain attacks compromise upstream dependencies.
item.dc:creator: Peter Girnus
Fernando Tucci
Deep Patel
Simon Dulude
Ashish Verma
John Rainier Navato
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Pawn Storm Campaign Deploys PRISMEX, Targets Government and Critical Infrastructure Entities
item.description: This blog discusses the steganography, cloud abuse, and email-based backdoors used against the Ukrainian defense supply chain in the latest Pawn Storm campaign that TrendAI™ Research observed and analyzed.
item.dc:creator: Feike Hacquebord
Hiroyuki Kakara
item.category: Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks
Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Your AI Stack Just Handed Over Your Root Keys: Inside the litellm PyPI Breach
item.description: Litellm PyPI breach explained: malicious versions steal cloud credentials, SSH keys, and Kubernetes secrets. Learn impact and urgent mitigation steps.
item.dc:creator: Fernando Tucci
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Copyright Lures Mask a Multi‑Stage PureLog Stealer Attack on Key Industries
item.description: We look into a stealthy multi‑stage attack campaign that delivers PureLog Stealer entirely in memory using encrypted, fileless techniques.
item.dc:creator: Mohamed Fahmy
Allixon Kristoffer Francisco
Jonna Santos
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Why East-West Visibility Matters for Grid Security
item.description: Learn how east-west traffic visibility helps detect and stop lateral movement attacks inside electric grid infrastructure and critical OT networks.

trendmicro:author.name: Vitaliy Shtym
trendmicro:author.title: VP, Business Strategy and Client Success

item.dc:creator: Vitaliy Shtym
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks

item.title: From Misconfigured Spring Boot Actuator to SharePoint Exfiltration: How Stolen Credentials Bypass MFA
item.description: Not every cloud breach starts with malware or a zero-day. In this incident, attackers discovered an exposed Spring Boot Actuator endpoint, harvested credentials from leaked configuration data, then used the OAuth2 Resource Owner Password Credentials (ROPC) flow to authenticate without MFA.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Soliven
Jovit Samaniego
Reine Roque
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: TrendAI™ Supports Global Law Enforcement Efforts
item.description: Learn how TrendAI™ and our researchers contributed threat intelligence and analysis to support INTERPOL against cybercrime.
item.dc:creator: TrendAI™ Research
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Web Shells, Tunnels, and Ransomware: Dissecting a Warlock Attack
item.description: Warlock continues to enhance its attack chain with new tactics to improve persistence, lateral movement, and defense evasion using an expanded toolset: TightVNC Yuze, and a persistent BYOVD technique leveraging the NSec driver.

trendmicro:author.name: Don Ovid Ladores
trendmicro:author.title: Senior Engineer, Threat IR and Forensic

item.dc:creator: Maristel Policarpio
Junestherry Dela Cruz
Sarah Pearl Camiling
Jacob Santos
Don Ovid Ladores
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Securing Autonomous AI Agents with TrendAI & NVIDIA OpenShell
item.description: Learn how TrendAI and NVIDIA OpenShell help secure autonomous AI agents and build trusted enterprise AI systems with stronger visibility and control.
item.dc:creator: Fernando Cardoso
King Cao
Truman Coburn
Bestin Koruthu
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Through the Lens of MDR: Analysis of KongTuke’s ClickFix Abuse of Compromised WordPress Sites
item.description: Our analysis of an active KongTuke campaign deploying modeloRAT — malware capable of reconnaissance, command execution, and persistent access — through compromised WordPress sites and fake CAPTCHA lures shows that the group still operates this delivery chain in parallel with the newer CrashFix technique.
item.dc:creator: Aira Marcelo
Jovit Samaniego
Ryan Maglaque
Fe Cureg
Lisa Wu
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: CISOs in a Pinch: A Security Analysis of OpenClaw
item.description: Learn about OpenClaw (a sovereign agent) and how this can be viable for enterprises.
item.dc:creator: Fernando Tucci
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: TrendAI™ at [un]prompted 2026: From KYC Exploits to Agentic Defense
item.description: At [un]prompted 2026, TrendAI™ demonstrated how documents can be used to exploit AI-driven KYC pipelines and introduced FENRIR, an automated system for discovering AI vulnerabilities at scale.
item.dc:creator: TrendAI™ Research
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: New BoryptGrab Stealer Targets Windows Users via Deceptive GitHub Pages
item.description: The BoryptGrab campaign uses fake SEO‑optimized GitHub repositories and deceptive download pages to distribute a data‑stealing malware family that delivers multiple payloads, including a reverse SSH backdoor, to Windows users.
item.dc:creator: Mingyue Shirley Yang
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Europol, Microsoft, TrendAI™ and Collaborators Halt Tycoon 2FA Operations
item.description: Tycoon 2FA was dismantled this week by law enforcement and industry partners including TrendAI™. The phishing-as-a-service platform offered MFA bypass services using adversary-in-the-middle (AitM) proxying.
item.dc:creator: Christopher Boyton
Mayra Rosario Fuentes
Stephen Hilt
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Claude Code Security set the Cybersecurity Stocks on Fire - Here's the Signal in the Smoke
item.description: Learn how Claude Code Security set Cybersecurity stocks on fire.
item.dc:creator: Fernando Tucci
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Malicious OpenClaw Skills Used to Distribute Atomic macOS Stealer
item.description: Malicious OpenClaw skills trick AI agents and users into installing a new AMOS variant that steals extensive data at scale.
item.dc:creator: Alfredo Oliveira
Buddy Tancio
David Fiser
Philippe Lin
Roel Reyes
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Spam Campaign Abuses Atlassian Jira, Targets Government and Corporate Entities
item.description: We uncover how a campaign used Atlassian Jira Cloud to launch automated and targeted spam campaigns, exploiting trusted SaaS workflows to bypass security controls.
item.dc:creator: TrendAI™ Research
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: U.S. Public Sector Under Siege
item.description: Discover why Government and Education must prioritize Cyber Risk Management.
item.dc:creator: Jon Clay
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Viral AI, Invisible Risks: What OpenClaw Reveals About Agentic Assistants
item.description: OpenClaw (aka Clawdbot or Moltbot) represents a new frontier in agentic AI: powerful, highly autonomous, and surprisingly easy to use. In this research, we examine how its capabilities compare to its predecessors’ and highlight the security risks inherent to the agentic AI paradigm.

trendmicro:author.name: Salvatore Gariuolo
trendmicro:author.title: Senior Threat Researcher, Forward-Looking Threat Research Team

trendmicro:author.name: Vincenzo Ciancaglini
trendmicro:author.title: Senior Threat Researcher, Forward-Looking Threat Research Team

item.dc:creator: Salvatore Gariuolo
Vincenzo Ciancaglini
Fernando Tucci
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Embracing Choice in Cybersecurity: TrendAI Vision One™ and SentinelOne Integration
item.description: Discover how the TrendAI Vision One and SentinelOne integration exemplifies our commitment to endpoint flexibility.
item.dc:creator: Jenny Hua
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Pwn2Own: Researchers Earn $1 Million for 76 Zero-Days
item.description: Discover how TrendAI Zero Day Initiative (ZDI) identified critical vulnerabilities across connected vehicles, EV chargers, and automotive systems.
item.dc:creator: Trend Micro Research
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: PeckBirdy: A Versatile Script Framework for LOLBins Exploitation Used by China-aligned Threat Groups
item.description: PeckBirdy is a sophisticated JScript-based C&C framework used by China-aligned APT groups to exploit LOLBins across multiple environments, delivering advanced backdoors to target gambling industries and Asian government entities.
item.dc:creator: Ted Lee
Joseph C Chen
item.category: Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks
Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Watering Hole Attack Targets EmEditor Users with Information-Stealing Malware
item.description: TrendAI™ Research provides a technical analysis of a compromised EmEditor installer used to deliver multistage malware that performs a range of malicious actions.

trendmicro:author.name: Don Ovid Ladores
trendmicro:author.title: Senior Engineer, Threat IR and Forensic

trendmicro:author.name: Yuya Sato
trendmicro:author.title: Senior Engineer, Threat IR and Forensic

trendmicro:author.name: Yosuke Akiho
trendmicro:author.title: Senior Engineer, Threat IR and Forensic

item.dc:creator: Don Ovid Ladores
Yuya Sato
Yosuke Akiho
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: From Extension to Infection: An In-Depth Analysis of the Evelyn Stealer Campaign Targeting Software Developers
item.description: This blog entry provides an in-depth analysis of the multistage delivery of the Evelyn information stealer, which was used in a campaign targeting software developers.
item.dc:creator: Ahmed Mohamed Ibrahim
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Your 100 Billion Parameter Behemoth is a Liability
item.description: The "bigger is better" era of AI is hitting a wall. We are in an LLM bubble, characterized by ruinous inference costs and diminishing returns. The future belongs to Agentic AI powered by specialized Small Language Models (SLMs). Think of it as a shift from hiring a single expensive genius to running a highly efficient digital factory. It’s cheaper, faster, and frankly, the only way to make agents work at scale.
item.dc:creator: Fernando Tucci
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Introducing ÆSIR: Finding Zero-Day Vulnerabilities at the Speed of AI
item.description: TrendAI™’s ÆSIR platform combines AI automation with expert oversight to discover zero-day vulnerabilities in AI infrastructure – 21 CVEs across NVIDIA, Tencent, and MLflow since mid-2025.
item.dc:creator: Peter Girnus
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Key Insights on SHADOW-AETHER-015 and Earth Preta from the 2025 MITRE ATT&CK Evaluation with TrendAI Vision One™
item.description: This blog discusses notable modern TTPs observed from SHADOW-AETHER-015 and Earth Preta, from TrendAI™ Research monitoring and TrendAI Vision One™ intelligence. These findings support the performance of TrendAI™ in the 2025 MITRE ATT&CK Evaluations.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks
Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Analyzing a Multi-Stage AsyncRAT Campaign via Managed Detection and Response
item.description: Threat actors exploited Cloudflare's free-tier infrastructure and legitimate Python environments to deploy the AsyncRAT remote access trojan, demonstrating advanced evasion techniques that abuse trusted cloud services for malicious operations.
item.dc:creator: Buddy Tancio
Jed Valderama
Khristoffer Jocson
Franklynn Uy
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Get Executives on board with managing Cyber Risk
item.description: Learn how the 2025 Trend Micro Defenders Survey Report helps paint a clear picture of how security teams are looking to work with executive leaders to manage cyber risk.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Trend Micro's Pivotal Role in INTERPOL's Operation Sentinel: Dismantling Digital Extortion Networks Across Africa
item.description: Continuing a Legacy of Successful Collaboration
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: What Does it Take to Manage Cloud Risk?
item.description: Learn why hybrid and multi-cloud environments are vital for IT and business success from our 2025 Trend Micro Defenders Survey.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: What Cyber Defenders Really Think About AI Risk
item.description: Learn how Trend Micro's 2025 Trend Micro Defenders Survey Report highlights current AI-related cybersecurity priorities and where security professionals use AI to their advantage.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Enhancing Security Awareness with Cyber Risk Exposure Management
item.description: Learn how to strategically tackle human risk for smarter prioritization and lasting behavioral change.
item.dc:creator: Sanjana Sadh
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Cyber Risk Management: Defenders Tell It Like It Is
item.description: Based on more than 3,000 responses from cybersecurity professionals in nearly 90 countries, our Trend Micro Defenders Survey Report 2025 shines a bright light on the current state of cyber risk management. From the impact of cloud and AI on IT environments to top technical and human challenges, this year’s findings have a lot to say about the pressures security teams are under and what organizations are doing to tighten their grip on cyber risk.

item.title: SHADOW-VOID-042 Targets Multiple Industries with Void Rabisu-like Tactics
item.description: In November, a targeted spear-phishing campaign was observed using Trend Micro-themed lures against various industries, but this was quickly detected and thwarted by the Trend Vision One™ platform.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Lunghi
Ian Kenefick
Feike Hacquebord
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Trend Vision One™ Integration with AWS Security Hub CSPM: Unifying Cloud Security
item.description: The integration between Trend Vision One and Security Hub CSPM is exactly that, two powerful platforms enhancing each other to keep your AWS infrastructure protected.
item.dc:creator: Eduardo Castro
Yessenia Becerra
Dave McDuff
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks

item.title: Trend Vision One™ Stacks Up Against Scattered Spider and Mustang Panda in 2025 MITRE ATT&CK® Evaluations
item.description: Enterprise 2025 introduces the first full cloud adversary emulation and expanded multi-platform testing, focusing on two advanced threat areas: Scattered Spider’s cloud-centric attacks and Mustang Panda’s long-term espionage operations.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: CVE-2025-55182: React2Shell Analysis, Proof-of-Concept Chaos, and In-the-Wild Exploitation
item.description: CVE-2025-55182 is a CVSS 10.0 pre-authentication RCE affecting React Server Components. Amid the flood of fake proof-of-concept exploits, scanners, exploits, and widespread misconceptions, this technical analysis intends to cut through the noise.
item.dc:creator: Peter Girnus
Deep Patel
Jack Walsh
Lucas Silva
Ashish Verma
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: AI-Automated Threat Hunting Brings GhostPenguin Out of the Shadows
item.description: In this blog entry, Trend™ Research provides a comprehensive breakdown of GhostPenguin, a previously undocumented Linux backdoor with low detection rates that was discovered through AI-powered threat hunting and in-depth malware analysis.
item.dc:creator: Aliakbar Zahravi
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Critical React Server Components Vulnerability CVE-2025-55182: What Security Teams Need to Know
item.description: CVE-2025-55182 is a critical (CVSS 10.0) pre-authentication remote code execution vulnerability affecting React Server Components used in React.js, Next.js, and related frameworks (see the context section for a more exhaustive list of affected frameworks).
item.dc:creator: Peter Girnus
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Project View: A New Era of Prioritized and Actionable Cloud Security
item.description: In today's cloud-first world, security teams face an overwhelming flood of alerts, fragmented visibility, and reactive workflows. The complexity of modern cloud environments—spanning multi-cloud deployments, ephemeral assets, and decentralized ownership—demands a new approach to risk management.
item.dc:creator: Truman Coburn
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: PureRAT Campaign Targets Job Seekers, Abuses Foxit PDF Reader for DLL Side-loading
item.description: Job seekers looking out for opportunities might instead find their personal devices compromised, as a PureRAT campaign propagated through email leverages Foxit PDF Reader for concealment and DLL side-loading for initial entry.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Pearl Camiling
Junestherry Dela Cruz
Jacob Santos
Sophia Nilette Robles
Maristel Policarpio
Raymart Yambot
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Unraveling Water Saci's New Multi-Format, AI-Enhanced Attacks Propagated via WhatsApp
item.description: Through AI-driven code conversion and a layered infection chain involving different file formats and scripting languages, the threat actors behind Water Saci are quickly upgrading their malware delivery and propagation methods across WhatsApp in Brazil.
item.dc:creator: Jeffrey Francis Bonaobra
Sarah Pearl Camiling
Joe Soares
Byron Gelera
Ian Kenefick
Emmanuel Panopio
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: What’s your CNAPP maturity?
item.description: More and more enterprises are opting for cloud-native application protection platforms (CNAPPs) instead of complex and hard-to-manage cloud security point solutions. Find out where your organization is on its CNAPP maturity journey.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks

item.title: Elevate Your Cloud Security Strategy
item.description: Learn to elevate your cloud security strategy & overcome complexity with Vision One™.
item.dc:creator: Eduardo Castro
Truman Coburn
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks

item.title: Shai-hulud 2.0 Campaign Targets Cloud and Developer Ecosystems
item.description: Shai-hulud 2.0 campaign features a sophisticated variant capable of stealing credentials and secrets from major cloud platforms and developer services, while automating the backdooring of NPM packages maintained by victims. Its advanced tactics enable rapid, stealthy propagation across the software supply chain, putting countless downstream users at risk.
item.dc:creator: Jeffrey Francis Bonaobra
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Trend & AWS Partner on Cloud IPS: One-Click Protection
item.description: In the race to secure cloud infrastructure, intrusion prevention systems (IPS) remain one of the most critical yet complex at the cloud network layer of defense. For many organizations, deploying IPS in the cloud is a balancing act between agility and control.
item.dc:creator: Bestin Koruthu
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks

item.title: Breaking Down S3 Ransomware: Variants, Attack Paths and Trend Vision One™ Defenses
item.description: In this blog entry, Trend™ Research explores how ransomware actors are shifting their focus to cloud-based assets, including the tactics used to compromise business-critical data in AWS environments.
item.dc:creator: Yash Verma
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Redefining Enterprise Defense in the Era of AI-Led Cyberattacks
item.description: More cybercriminals are turning to using autonomous AI tools to upgrade their attacks, as exemplified by the recent utilization of Anthropic’s Claude Code, prompting an urgent need for enterprises to adopt agentic AI-driven security platforms and proactive defenses to counter AI-related threats.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Increase in Lumma Stealer Activity Coincides with Use of Adaptive Browser Fingerprinting Tactics
item.description: In this blog entry, Trend™ Research analyses the layered command-and-control approaches that Lumma Stealer uses to maintain its ongoing operations while enhancing collection of victim-environment data.
item.dc:creator: Junestherry Dela Cruz
Sarah Pearl Camiling
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: From Data Loss Prevention (DLP) to Modern Data Security
item.description: It’s time to rethink your approach
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: IBM Infrastructure: Continuous Risk & Compliance
item.description: Learn all about AI-powered visibility, telemetry, and proactive security across mainframe, cloud, containers, and enterprise workloads.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: How are you managing cloud risk?
item.description: Learn why managing cloud risk demands unified visibility, continuous risk assessment, and efficient security operations. Discover how a full-featured CNAPP like Trend Vision One™ Cloud Security enables organizations to move from reactive to proactive cloud protection.
item.dc:creator: Bestin Koruthu
Truman Coburn
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks

item.title: AI Security: NVIDIA BlueField Now with Vision One™
item.description: Launching at NVIDIA GTC 2025 - Transforming AI Security with Trend Vision One™ on NVIDIA BlueField
item.dc:creator: Fernando Cardoso
Eduardo Castro
Nancy Chuang
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Active Water Saci Campaign Spreading Via WhatsApp Features Multi-Vector Persistence and Sophisticated C&C
item.description: Continuous investigation on the Water Saci campaign reveals innovative email-based C&C system, multi-vector persistence, and real-time command capabilities that allow attackers to orchestrate coordinated botnet operations, gather detailed campaign intelligence, and dynamically control malware activity across multiple infected machines.
item.dc:creator: Jeffrey Francis Bonaobra
Joe Soares
Emmanuel Panopio
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Agenda Ransomware Deploys Linux Variant on Windows Systems Through Remote Management Tools and BYOVD Techniques
item.description: Trend™ Research identified a sophisticated Agenda ransomware attack that deployed a Linux variant on Windows systems. This cross-platform execution can make detection challenging for enterprises.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Santos
Junestherry Dela Cruz
Sarah Pearl Camiling
Sophia Nilette Robles
Maristel Policarpio
Raymart Yambot
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Trend Micro Recognized as a Leader in The Forrester Wave™ 2025 for NAV
item.description: Unified visibility, proactive intelligence, and proven leadership in network analysis and visibility.
item.dc:creator: Jamal Bethea
item.category: Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks
Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: The Rise of Collaborative Tactics Among China-aligned Cyber Espionage Campaigns
item.description: Trend™ Research examines the complex collaborative relationship between China-aligned APT groups via the new “Premier Pass-as-a-Service” model, exemplified by the recent activities of Earth Estries and Earth Naga.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Lunghi
Leon M Chang
item.category: Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks

item.title: How Trend Micro Empowers the SOC with Agentic SIEM
item.description: By delivering both XDR leadership and Agentic SIEM innovation under one platform, Trend is redefining what security operations can be.
item.dc:creator: Joyce Huang
Stephanie Tang
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Fast, Broad, and Elusive: How Vidar Stealer 2.0 Upgrades Infostealer Capabilities
item.description: Trend™ Research examines the latest version of the Vidar stealer, which features a full rewrite in C, a multithreaded architecture, and several enhancements that warrant attention. Its timely evolution suggests that Vidar is positioning itself to occupy the space left after Lumma Stealer’s decline.
item.dc:creator: Junestherry Dela Cruz
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Shifts in the Underground: The Impact of Water Kurita’s (Lumma Stealer) Doxxing
item.description: A targeted underground doxxing campaign exposed alleged core members of Lumma Stealer (Water Kurita), resulting in a sharp decline in its activity and a migration of customers to rival infostealer platforms.
item.dc:creator: Junestherry Dela Cruz
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Operation Zero Disco: Attackers Exploit Cisco SNMP Vulnerability to Deploy Rootkits
item.description: Trend™ Research has uncovered an attack campaign exploiting the Cisco SNMP vulnerability CVE-2025-20352, allowing remote code execution and rootkit deployment on unprotected devices, with impacts observed on Cisco 9400, 9300, and legacy 3750G series.
item.dc:creator: Dove Chiu
Lucien Chuang
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Trend Micro launches new integration with Zscaler to deliver real-time, Risk-Based Zero Trust Access
item.description: Discover how Trend Vision One™ integrates with Zscaler to unify detection and access enforcement, accelerate threat containment, reduce dwell time, and deliver seamless Zero Trust protection for modern enterprises.
item.dc:creator: Jenny Hua
item.category: Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks
Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: RondoDox: From Targeting Pwn2Own Vulnerabilities to Shotgunning Exploits
item.description: Trend™ Research and ZDI Threat Hunters have identified a large-scale RondoDox botnet campaign exploiting over 50 vulnerabilities across more than 30 vendors, including flaws first seen in Pwn2Own contests.
item.dc:creator: Deep Patel
Ashish Verma
Simon Dulude
Peter Girnus
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Weaponized AI Assistants & Credential Thieves
item.description: Learn the state of AI and the NPM ecosystem with the recent s1ngularity' weaponized AI for credential theft.
item.dc:creator: Fernando Tucci
item.category: Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks
Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: How Your AI Chatbot Can Become a Backdoor
item.description: In this post of THE AI BREACH, learn how your Chatbot can become a backdoor.
item.dc:creator: Kim Kinahan
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: A Cascade of Insecure Architectures: Axis Plugin Design Flaw Expose Select Autodesk Revit Users to Supply Chain Risk
item.description: We discovered Azure Storage Account credentials exposed in Axis Communications’ Autodesk Revit plugin, allowing unauthorized modification of cloud-hosted files. This exposure, combined with vulnerabilities in Autodesk Revit, could enable supply-chain attacks targeting end users.
item.dc:creator: Nitesh Surana
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Self-Propagating Malware Spreading Via WhatsApp, Targets Brazilian Users
item.description: Trend™ Research has identified an active campaign spreading via WhatsApp through a ZIP file attachment. When executed, the malware establishes persistence and hijacks the compromised WhatsApp account to send copies of itself to the victim’s contacts.
item.dc:creator: Jeffrey Francis Bonaobra
Maristel Policarpio
Sophia Nilette Robles
Cj Arsley Mateo
Jacob Santos
Paul John Bardon
Bren Matthew Ebriega
John Rainier Navato

item.title: Cloud Security in the CNAPP Era: Eight Important Takeaways
item.description: Eight takeaways on why Trend Vision One™ embodies the best of today’s CNAPP vision. Includes insights from 2025 Gartner® Market Guide for CNAPP
item.dc:creator: Bestin Koruthu
Truman Coburn
Fernando Cardoso
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: CNAPP is the Solution to Multi-cloud Flexibility
item.description: Cloud-native application protection platform (CNAPP) not only helps organizations protect, but offers the flexibility of multi-cloud.
item.dc:creator: Bestin Koruthu
Truman Coburn
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: New LockBit 5.0 Targets Windows, Linux, ESXi
item.description: Trend™ Research analyzed source binaries from the latest activity from notorious LockBit ransomware with their 5.0 version that exhibits advanced obfuscation, anti-analysis techniques, and seamless cross-platform capabilities for Windows, Linux, and ESXi systems.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Pearl Camiling
Jacob Santos

item.title: This Is How Your LLM Gets Compromised
item.description: Poisoned data. Malicious LoRAs. Trojan model files. AI attacks are stealthier than ever—often invisible until it’s too late. Here’s how to catch them before they catch you.
item.dc:creator: Fernando Tucci
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Domino Effect: How One Vendor's AI App Breach Toppled Giants
item.description: A single AI chatbot breach at Salesloft-Drift exposed data from 700+ companies, including security leaders. The attack shows how AI integrations expand risk, and why controls like IP allow-listing, token security, and monitoring are critical.
item.dc:creator: Fernando Tucci
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: AI-Powered App Exposes User Data, Creates Risk of Supply Chain Attacks
item.description: Trend™ Research’s analysis of Wondershare RepairIt reveals how the AI-driven app exposed sensitive user data due to unsecure cloud storage practices and hardcoded credentials, creating risks of model tampering and supply chain attacks.
item.dc:creator: Alfredo Oliveira
David Fiser
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: How AI-Native Development Platforms Enable Fake Captcha Pages
item.description: Cybercriminals are abusing AI-native platforms like Vercel, Netlify, and Lovable to host fake captcha pages that deceive users, bypass detection, and drive phishing campaigns.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Flores
Bakuei Matsukawa
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: What We Know About the NPM Supply Chain Attack
item.description: Trend™ Research outlines the critical details behind the ongoing NPM supply chain attack and offers essential steps to stay protected against potential compromise.
item.dc:creator: Jeffrey Francis Bonaobra
Joshua Aquino
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: EvilAI Operators Use AI-Generated Code and Fake Apps for Far-Reaching Attacks
item.description: Combining AI-generated code and social engineering, EvilAI operators are executing a rapidly expanding campaign, disguising their malware as legitimate applications to bypass security, steal credentials, and persistently compromise organizations worldwide.
item.dc:creator: Jeffrey Francis Bonaobra
Joshua Aquino
Emmanuel Panopio
Emmanuel Roll
Joshua Lijandro Tsang
Armando Nathaniel Pedragoza
Melvin Singwa
Mohammed Malubay
Marco Dela Vega

item.title: What’s Your Cybersecurity Maturity?
item.description: This blog post looks at four key milestones along the cybersecurity maturity journey and poses some questions you can ask to determine the stage of your organization’s progress.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Unmasking The Gentlemen Ransomware: Tactics, Techniques, and Procedures Revealed
item.description: An analysis of the Gentlemen ransomware group, which employs advanced, adaptive tactics, techniques, and procedure to target critical industries worldwide.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Santos
Maristel Policarpio
Don Ovid Ladores
Junestherry Dela Cruz
item.category: Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks
Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Three Critical Facts About Cyber Risk Management
item.description: For CISOs responsible for cyber risk management, these three insights will help build a strong and reliable foundation for your proactive security strategy.
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: An MDR Analysis of the AMOS Stealer Campaign Targeting macOS via ‘Cracked’ Apps
item.description: Trend™ Research analyzed a campaign distributing Atomic macOS Stealer (AMOS), a malware family targeting macOS users. Attackers disguise the malware as “cracked” versions of legitimate apps, luring users into installation.
item.dc:creator: Buddy Tancio
Aldrin Ceriola
Khristoffer Jocson
Nusrath Iqra
Faith Higgins
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Operation Serengeti 2.0: Trend Micro Helps Law Enforcement Fight Cybercrime in Africa
item.description: Operation Serengeti 2.0: With Trend Micro’s support, INTERPOL led a major crackdown across Africa, arresting cybercriminals, dismantling infrastructures, recovering illicit funds, and protecting tens of thousands of victims.
item.dc:creator: Trend Micro Research
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Trend Vision One™ Email Security Raises the Standard
item.description: Stay ahead of evolving threats with AI-powered email and collaboration security.
item.dc:creator: Sara Atie
Clement Perrin
item.category: Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks
Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: TAOTH Campaign Exploits End-of-Support Software to Target Traditional Chinese Users and Dissidents
item.description: The TAOTH campaign exploited abandoned software and spear-phishing to deploy multiple malware families, targeting dissidents and other high-value individuals across Eastern Asia.
item.dc:creator: Nick Dai
Pierre Lee
item.category: Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks
Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Trend Vision One Integrates Microsoft Defender for Endpoint
item.description: Discover how Trend Vision One integrates with Microsoft Defender for Endpoint to unify visibility, close security gaps, and accelerate risk mitigation - maximizing protection without replacing existing tools.
item.dc:creator: Jenny Hua
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Leadership, Innovation, and the Future of AI: Lessons from Trend Micro CEO & Co-Founder Eva Chen
item.description: Discover how AI is reshaping cybersecurity through our CEO, Eva Chen’s industry briefing series. Gain practical strategies, real-world insights, and a clear roadmap to secure your AI initiatives with confidence.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Savoie
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Warlock: From SharePoint Vulnerability Exploit to Enterprise Ransomware
item.description: Warlock ransomware exploits unpatched Microsoft SharePoint vulnerabilities to gain access, escalate privileges, steal credentials, move laterally, and deploy ransomware with data exfiltration across enterprise environments.
item.dc:creator: Jeffrey Francis Bonaobra
Joshua Aquino
Mohammed Malubay
John Paul Lim
Emmanuel Panopio
Emmanuel Roll
Melvin Singwa
Carl Jayson Peliña
Armando Nathaniel Pedragoza
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Crypto24 Ransomware Group Blends Legitimate Tools with Custom Malware for Stealth Attacks
item.description: Crypto24 is a ransomware group that stealthily blends legitimate tools with custom malware, using advanced evasion techniques to bypass security and EDR technologies.
item.dc:creator: Maristel Policarpio
Sarah Pearl Camiling
Don Ovid Ladores
Jacob Santos
Andrei Alimboyao
Lance Albert Mendoza
Krisford Macalalad
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: New Ransomware Charon Uses Earth Baxia APT Techniques to Target Enterprises
item.description: We uncovered a campaign that makes use of Charon, a new ransomware family, and advanced APT-style techniques to target organizations with customized ransom demands.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Santos
Ted Lee
Ahmed Kamal
Don Ovid Ladores
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Gunra Ransomware Group Unveils Efficient Linux Variant
item.description: This blog discusses how Gunra ransomware’s new Linux variant accelerates and customizes encryption, expanding the group’s reach with advanced cross-platform tactics.
item.dc:creator: Jeffrey Francis Bonaobra
Melvin Singwa
Emmanuel Panopio
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Unlocking the Power of Amazon Security Lake for Proactive Security
item.description: Security is a central challenge in modern application development and maintenance, requiring not just traditional practices but also a deep understanding of application architecture and data flow. While organizations now have access to rich data like logs and telemetry, the real challenge lies in translating this information into actionable insights. This article explores how leveraging those insights can help detect genuine security incidents and prevent their recurrence.
item.dc:creator: Felipe Costa
Eduardo Golcman
Fernando Cardoso
Frank Shi
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks

item.title: Revisiting UNC3886 Tactics to Defend Against Present Risk
item.description: We examine the past tactics used by UNC3886 to gain insight on how to best strengthen defenses against the ongoing and emerging threats of this APT group.
item.dc:creator: Cj Arsley Mateo
Ieriz Nicolle Gonzalez
Jacob Santos
Paul John Bardon
Angelo Junio
Rayven Cervantes
item.category: Trend Micro Research : APT & Targeted Attacks
Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Proactive Email Security: The Power of AI
item.description: Lead with AI-powered email security to stay ahead of attackers and personalize user interaction at every touchpoint, bridging technology and behavior with precision.
item.dc:creator: Sara Atie
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Back to Business: Lumma Stealer Returns with Stealthier Methods
item.description: Lumma Stealer has re-emerged shortly after its takedown. This time, the cybergroup behind this malware appears to be intent on employing more covert tactics while steadily expanding its reach. This article shares the latest methods used to propagate this threat.
item.dc:creator: Junestherry Dela Cruz
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports

item.title: Proactive Security Insights for SharePoint Attacks (CVE-2025-53770 and CVE-2025-53771)
item.description: CVE-2025-53770 and CVE-2025-53771 are vulnerabilities in on-premise Microsoft SharePoint Servers that evolved from previously patched flaws, allowing unauthenticated remote code execution through advanced deserialization and ViewState abuse.
item.dc:creator: Trend Micro Research
item.category: Trend Micro Research : Articles, News, Reports
